name: Hot Stuffed Cheddar Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the baked potatoes lengthwise and scoop out the centers, leaving about 1/4 inch of shell.
2. In a bowl, combine the soup and milk, then add the shredded cheddar cheese until melted.
3. Keep the mixture warm over medium heat.
4. Break up the potato pieces and stir in the cooked broccoli and chicken.
5. Add the remaining cheese sauce, salt, and pepper to the potato mixture.
6. Spoon the mixture into the potato shells.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
8. Pour hot sauce over each serving before serving.
